nasb.text: A man will be satisfied with good by the fruit of his words, And the deeds of a man’s hands will return to him.

esv.text: From the fruit of his mouth a man is satisfied with good, and the work of a man’s hand comes back to him.

cnv.text: 人因口所結的果子必飽嘗美物； 人手所作的必歸到他身上。

ccb.text: 口出良言，饱尝美福； 双手勤劳，终得回报。

csbs.text: 人因口所结的果实，饱享福份； 人手所做的，必回报自身。
